title: T-043 — fa_builder_outputs storage + signed URL service (24h expiry)
prompt:
# T-043 — fa_builder_outputs storage + signed URL

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §10.6
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create fa_builder_outputs table + persistDownloadable(productCode, buffer) writing to S3-compatible bucket and returning signed URL with 24h expiry; supersede prior outputs when fa.built flips.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0051 emits fa_builder_outputs table per §10.6. New packages/storage/src/builder-storage.ts persists buffer to bucket (path tenant/<id>/builder/FA<code>-<ts>.xlsx), inserts row, returns signed URL. supersede helper sets prior superseded_at when newer row inserted.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0051_fa_builder_outputs.sql [create]
- packages/storage/src/builder-storage.ts [create]
- packages/storage/__tests__/builder-storage.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0051 ran, when describing schema, then fa_builder_outputs has product_code FK, file_path, generated_at, generated_by_user, app_version, superseded_at columns + RLS
2. Given persistDownloadable(productCode, buffer) called, when run, then bucket has file at expected path and table row inserted with current timestamp
3. Given a prior row exists, when persistDownloadable called again, then prior row.superseded_at is set and signed URL points to new row

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests using minio/localstack fixture
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter storage test builder-storage'

## Risk red lines
- Do not put buffer into postgres
- Do not return URL without expiry
- Do not use cross-tenant bucket prefix
